meaning: n.篱笆,栏,障碍,跨栏,活动篱笆v.用篱笆围住,跳过(栏栅),克服(障碍)
examples: His horse fell at the final hurdle.
His horse fell as it jumped the last hurdle.
Another hurdle is the peak's shape.
The next hurdle was getting the microscopic particles of powdered insulin into easy-to-handle packages in uniform doses.
Albert puts Jehue through his paces again, slapping his trailing leg as he hits the hurdle.
